name: Synco Xtalk XPro2 Wireless Intercom System with 2 Single-Ear Headsets
description: The Synco Xtalk XPro2 is full-duplex wireless intercom system designed to provide clear communication in a true-wireless form factor without requiring a bodypack or hub.

features.Key Features: 2 Single-Ear Headset, No Hub Needed | Full-Duplex, Use Any Headset as Master | True Wireless Headset, No Bodypack | AI Audio Echo Cancellation (AEC) 2.0 | Expandable to 13 Headsets | 1640' Transmission Distance | 24-Hour Battery Life, 3.5mm Monitor Jack | Compatible with XTalk X & XMax | Rechargeable Batteries, Charging Station
features.What's in the box?: Synco Xtalk XPro2 Wireless Intercom System with 2 Single-Ear Headsets (2.4 GHz) | 2 x Headset | Charging Station | Charging Cable | 2 x Rechargeable Battery | 2 x One-Ear Foam Cushion | 2 x Mic Windshield | 2 x Carrying Bag | Limited 1-Year Manufacturer Warranty
